programme.desc: Elizabeth enloquece y trata de llevarse a Aurora, y Lorenzo llega para rescatarla. La policía se lleva presa a Elizabeth, pero aun así ella sigue siendo una amenaza. El destino parece seguir alejando a Martín del amor verdadero. César visita a Lorenzo.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Lorenzo entra en el mundo oscuro de sus hijos para salvarles la vida. Nina va a la boca del lobo, desafiando al hombre que quiere ver muerto a sus hermanos. Inés avisa a Catalina que Pasión Urquijo ha sido reanimada y se juntan para acabar con ella.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Lorenzo y Martín consiguen nuevamente salvar a César de la muerte. Aurora logra rehacer su vida con la promesa de hacer feliz al hombre que ama, pero antes necesita el perdón de Martín. Catalina no perdona que Martín haya reanimado a Pasión Urquijo.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Aurora y Lorenzo finalmente harán realidad su sueño de amor, pero Federico llega para interrumpir la tan anhelada boda. Aurora cree que Martín murió y desaparece, llevándose a Tommy. Vanesa se entera que Vicky fue envenenada y jura vengarse de todos.

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Vicky es reanimada y por poco pierde la vida nuevamente, pero Martín se la regresa con un beso. Lorenzo y Aurora están separados, pero viven juntos por Tommy. Blanca le dice a César que está esperando un hijo suyo; Vanesa también le tiene sorpresas.

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Aurora y Lorenzo se dejan llevar por sus pasiones y se regalan 24 horas de amor solo para ellos. Vicky empieza a despertar deseos en Martín. César se entera que Vanesa está embarazada. Gustavo visita a Elizabeth para advertirle que está con Natalia.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Martín y Aurora hacen un pacto de silencio cuando descubren que ella empieza a envejecer poco a poco. Buscan evitar el dolor en Lorenzo y que esto se convierta en un nuevo reto para Elizabeth. Martín descubre quién es la verdadera madre de César.

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Although chicken dinners are quick to prepare, they can go terribly wrong. Part of the problem is the chicken itself—the breast meat has little fat and becomes dry and chalky if overcooked. The other major source of trouble is improper cooking methods.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: French country cooking has a way with chicken in a pot, whether it's the famous chicken with 40 cloves of garlic or the lesser-known chicken Provençal. These dishes take chicken to new heights—or go awry.

programme.desc: New England Bar Pizza, Lemon Pepper Wings; Spinach and Artichoke Dip; Grill Pans

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Bridget and Julia uncover the secrets to a Latin classic, Arroz con Pollo. Then, Jack challenges Bridget to a tasting of store-bought whipped topping. And finally, Christie reveals the steps for a Florida favorite, Sour Orange Pie.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Julia shows Bridget how to make a regional favorite, Southern Style Smothered Chicken. Then, Adam reveals the best Kitchen Timer on the market. Finally, Bridget reveals the secrets to a show-stopping Apple Pandowdy.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Bridget shares steps to achieving perfect Memphis-style Wet Ribs in the Slow Cooker. Next, Jack challenges Julia to an apple-cider vinegar tasting. And finally, Ashley teaches Bridget how to make the leftover favorite, Mashed Potato Cakes from scratch.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia makes gas-grilled shrimp skewers with lemon-garlic sauce, a tangy farro salad with white beans and snap peas, plus homemade strawberry frozen yogurt and chocolate shell topping.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia whips up her favorite fried chicken with slow-cooker buttermilk smashed potatoes, and quick collard greens with hot pepper vinegar

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia shares her recipe for easy broiled salmon with mustard and crisp dilled crust, orzo salad with cucumber, red onion, and mint, plus a pretty and pink berry fool for dessert

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia's take on comfort food includes thick-cut pork chops with smoked sea salt, garlic-scented mashed sweet potatoes with coconut milk and cilantro, a brussels sprouts and kale salad with herbs and peanuts, and her slow-cooker nutella bread pudding.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Purchase a good steak and cook it properly, and all it needs is salt and pepper—and, of course, a side of spuds. We wanted potatoes with perfect texture and big flavor—something unusual to accompany a great steak and a good bottle of wine.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Restaurant steak tips are often tough and weirdly seasoned, and thick steak fries can be pale and soggy. The test kitchen felt confident that we could rescue these dishes and turn them into something you would welcome into your home.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Preparing favorite French dishes such as cassoulet or tarte Tatin calls for a lot of patience and time. We wondered if we could find ways to simplify these recipes without sacrificing the qualities that make them classics.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Few recipes deliver so much pleasure for so little work as pancakes. The batter comes together in minutes, and the cooking time is brief. Why, then, do most Americans never make pancakes from scratch?

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Although easy to prepare, most cookie recipes are notoriously fickle. A minor ingredient change or fluctuation in oven temperature can yield unexpected results. Our goal was simple: Take two favorite cookies and develop reliable recipes that taste great.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The test kitchen decided to tackle two popular sheet cakes—carrot and chocolate—and produce simple recipes that would deliver superior results.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Although some would never dare to adulterate plain cheesecake, variations abound—some good, some bad, some ugly. We wanted our cheesecake to be both light and creamy, with great lemon flavor.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: When entertaining, we like desserts that look more complicated to prepare than they really are. A chocolate mousse cake or chilled lemon soufflé requires basic ingredients but is sure to elicit the proper oohs and aahs from guests.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We like appetizers that deliver big flavor without much work. This means spiced nuts that are not overly sweet, spinach dip that is bold and creamy (not watery and insipid), and beef satay that is tender and vibrant.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Most cooks are under the impression that good soup takes all day to prepare. We'll show you how to make simplified versions of two favorite soups: chicken noodle and Italian pasta and bean.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Soup for supper is an appealing concept, especially on a cold night. But for soup to work as a main course, it better be hearty. Our vibrant lentil soup fits the bill, and we round out this meal with quick cheese bread.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Some local dishes become so popular that they transcend their region. Gumbo is a taste of Louisiana in a big old bowl. And Cincinnati chili is American original, served with buttered spaghetti, kidney beans, cheddar cheese, and chopped onions.

programme.desc: Julia reveals the secrets to making Citrus-Braised Pork Tacos. Then, Jack challenges Julia to a Mild Salsa taste test. Next, Christie shows Julia how to achieve unforgettable Churros right at home. Finally, Adam shares his favorite piping bag.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Donna tries to help Neely overcome her addiction to painkillers. Craig Pomeroy shows up at Baywatch to defend the legal rights of an elderly Native American shaman determined to initiate his tribe's traditional death ritual on the Baywatch beach.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Cody ignores regulations and leaves his tower five minutes early to meet Lani for a hot date. Right after he leaves, a young woman goes swimming and is engulfed by a wave, never to reappear. Cody is tortured by the results of his negligence.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Caroline's truck is hijacked by a young thief who forces her to drive him on a wild getaway chase. Neely reveals a shocking secret about her outrageous actions during her hiatus from Baywatch.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Prejudice threatens Manny and April's relationship, driving April into Craig's comforting arms. An encounter with sharks leads Craig and April to take shelter in a water treatment plant's intake pipe where they encounter even more danger!

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch learns that a cache of US Marine weapons has been stolen and probably hidden offshore. Mitch and Cody locate a sunken vessel with the arms on board, but before they can confiscate them, they are taken captive.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After breaking up with Manny, April finds romance with Craig, who is having a mid-life crisis. While working together to catch a trio of wild men on waverunners harassing swimmers, Craig and April's passion heats up.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch uses Hobie to initiate a relationship with Hobie's horseback riding instructor. Cody, JD, and Lani try to make extra cash in a scheme to collect Sea Urchins, but when another diver gets into trouble, Lani puts her life at risk to save him.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Garner enlists Mitch’s help to track down and capture a ring of drug smugglers operating from a boat offshore. The stakes get deadly when Neely goes undercover to plant a bug and her cover is blown! Lani struggles to come to terms with her deafness.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Cody makes a crazy bet with some local hotshots. Mitch risks his uncle's new Scarab in a wild race. Meanwhile, Neely and her baby daughter Ashley move in with Mitch for a couple of days sparking a twist to their relationship.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After a swimmer shows symptoms of a deadly virus, headquarters is quarantined, trapping Mitch, April, Donna, and JD inside with an annoying salesman. With JD waylaid, Newman takes on his plum assignment overseeing a photoshoot of sexy models.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After he saves Neely's new nanny from a boating disaster, she develops a lethal attraction to Mitch. April and Manny join a charity contest arranged by Newmie for his juvenile diabetic nephew.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: While Lani prepares for a photo shoot on a cruise to Alaska, Neely travels to see her ex-husband who lives in Juneau. Hobie's good fortune lands him, Mitch and Cody on the cruise ship to Alaska as well, but danger lurks onboard.

programme.title: Bellator 131: Ortiz vs. Bonnar
programme.desc: The talking is over. Bonnar. Ortiz. Time to fight.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA heads to Thackerville, Oklahoma with the Bantamweight title on the line as Joe Warren defends his strap against Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu World Champion Marcos Galvao. And Ryan Couture faces off against Dakota Cochrane in a lightweight clash.

programme.title: Bellator 138: Kimbo vs Shamrock
programme.desc: Bellator MMA presents a grudge match seven years in the making as Kimbo Slice finally meets Ken Shamrock. Patricio Pitbull goes to war with Daniel Weichel for the featherweight title. Plus WWE superstar Bobby Lashley and Michael Chandler return to action.

programme.title: Bellator 144: Halsey vs Carvalho
programme.desc: The middleweight title is on the line as Bellator MMA returns to Mohegan Sun with Rafael Carvalho vs. Brandon Halsey. And walking highlight reel Michael “MVP” Page is in action, along with submission specialist Goiti Yamauchi.

programme.title: Bellator 148: Daley vs Uhrich
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Fresno, California as feared knockout artist Paul Daley looks to make a highlight reel out of Andy Uhrich, while heavy-handed Patricky Pitbull aims to add another KO to his record when he takes on the son of an icon, Ryan Couture.

programme.title: Bellator 153: Koreshkov vs Henderson
programme.desc: Benson Henderson makes his Bellator debut against Champion Andrey Koreshkov.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to San Jose, California with a highly anticipated matchup be-tween King Mo and Phil Mr. Wonderful Davis. Also, hard-hitting lightweight Saad “The Assassin” Awad and submission ace Adam Piccolotti aim to impress.

programme.title: Bellator 158: Lima v Daley
programme.desc: Bellator MMA invades England as Paul Daley and Douglas Lima meet in a long-awaited showdown between welterweight knockout artists. And don’t miss Michael “MVP” Page as he looks to go viral against Cyborg Santos. Plus Matt Mitrione and James Gallagher!

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA invades Memphis as former middleweight champion Alexander Shlemenko takes on Kendall “Da Spyda” Grove. And WWE superstar Bobby Lashley looks to continue his winning ways against Josh Appelt in a battle of hard-hitting heavyweights.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA goes global as it emanates from Tel Aviv, Israel for a highly anticipated rematch between Andrey Koreshkov and Douglas Lima for the welterweight title in whats sure to be an action-packed main-event between two of the best in the world.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to the SAP Center in San Jose with a long awaited lightweight title showdown between champ Michael Chandler and Benson Henderson, and another pair of hard-hitting lightweights collide as Brandon Girtz faces off with Adam Piccolotti.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Danielle and Nick insist they were great parents, saying Danielle’s sister, Kimberly, “kidnapped” their child. Kimberly says these parents are drug addicts. Dr. Phil is their chance to bring their child home despite currently living in a homeless shelter.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jenaye comes face-to-face for the first time with the woman her husband, James, slept with on their fifth wedding anniversary. The woman, Chelsey, who is also James's former hairstylist, tells her side of the story. Will Jenaye believe Chelsey's claims?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues conversation with Shemida and her sister, Dana, who says Shemida’s 70-plus diagnoses are tearing the family apart. Dr. Phil unites this family in an effort to find answers. Is Shemida really sick, or is she addicted to attention? Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Julie & Mike say daughter Brooke, 16, may look sweet & innocent, but she's an out-of-control teen who fights, runs away from home, shoplifts & dates older men. Plus, meet Jody, an admitted alcoholic & anorexic. Can Dr. Phil save these two from themselves?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Gina asked Dr. Phil for help with her daughter Alexis, saying she was kidnapped by her survivalist boyfriend David. As the story unfolds, another layer surfaces, allegations of molestation by a family member. Find out who, and will a polygraph tell all?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Bleach, Keys, Bologna": all used as retaliation weapons. Dr. Phil, criminal atty Anthony Pope, & revenge expert Dr. Gina Barreca discuss--such as use of superglue on a man's private parts & also, Michael Brewer, 15, badly burned over a stolen bike. Pt.1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Tom is 100% convinced his fiancée, Teaka, is cheating on him with his friends, neighbors, coworkers, & even the mailman! Tom has all-new video evidence to show Dr. Phil & Teaka to prove Teaka's unfaithfulness. Teaka declares she has never cheated on Tom.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Melissa says Destoni, 14, is an aggressive, violent bully. She's chased her sister with a butcher knife, yells at teachers in the hallways but Destoni crossed a line when she threatened to shoot her teacher and other students, causing suspension. Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In a bizarre abuse case, Gypsy Rose Blanchard's mother forced her to pretend she was ill, undergo countless surgeries, shave her head, insert a feeding tube & use a wheelchair. A web of deceit & torture led to murder. Gypsy Rose talks with Dr. Phil.Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A father pleads for help regarding his missing daughter. Gabby Petito, 22, set off on a van trip with her fiancé, but two months later he returned alone. Police revealed the couple had an incident--caught on camera. Gabby's dad is determined to find her.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Author Dr. Philip Zimbardo, The Lucifer Effect: Understanding How Good People Turn Evil, and Dr. Phil examined what makes a good person do bad things. They continue to explore blind obedience to authority & an eye-opening experiment on group conformity.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil investigates a popular new website that dishes the dirt on non-celebrities. On creator Nik Richie's controversial site, TheDirty.com, people anonymously submit photos & negative comments about anyone in their community, tabloid style.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Amanda, 25, says she was molested over 795 times by her father, Earl Nix, a secret when revealed to family was rejected despite Nix being convicted of first-degree criminal sexual conduct. The family comes face-to-face in an emotional attempt for truth.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Robert, a retired professor, says he began dating as his 40-year marriage unraveled. Wife Jeremi says Robert spent their $1 million savings on day trading and giving money to women, who she insists are catfish. Dr. Phil finds out what is going on. Part 1

channel.display-name: Best of The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Talk" co-host Sheryl Underwood is joining Drew and talking all about dating! Drew and Ross Mathews are covering the latest headlines in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Ant-Man and the Wasp: Quantumania" star William Jackson Harper is telling Drew about his role in the new Marvel film, why he took his dog to a pet psychic and how he met his girlfriend.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Grand Crew" star Echo Kellum is joining Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to cover headlines like who Billboard reports is the most popular artist on the planet.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are back at the news desk and hitting the hottest headlines. Drew-crew member Pilar Valdes is sharing pro tips for making burgers. Horticulturist Chris Freimuth is sharing some easy flower tips.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are hitting the headlines covering a new middle seat airplane lottery and whether hearing birds can help boost your mood.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Costume designer Patricia Field is telling Drew all about some of the famous looks she's created for "Sex and the City," "The Devil Wears Prada" and more.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: A Good Person" director and producer Zach Braff is telling Drew about the real-life inspiration behind his new film, working on it with Florence Pugh and why he got his pilot's license.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up covering everything from the new freemium trend in dating apps to the grinch getting a horror makeover this Christmas to the great 1860 painting cellphone debate.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Camilla Cabello opens-up about dating, what she's looking for in her next partner, working with relationship goals couple Gwen Stefani and Blake Shelton on "The Voice" and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew & Ross Mathews host Drew MerryMore X People Magazine Holiday Giveaway. Studio audience of Drew-gooders get $300K in gifts. Drew highlights Drew-Gooders making difference in community.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are hitting the hottest headlines in an all-new Drew's News. In a new weekender, they're also sharing their best tips for the weekend.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The People we Hate at the Wedding" stars Ben Platt and Dustin Milligan stop by to chat about their new film. Drew and Ross Mathews are hitting the headlines in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew's chat with Michelle Obama continues and she's talking all about making friends in the White House and more.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew is joined by legendary musician Lionel Richie! "Saturday Night Live" star Sarah Sherman is joining Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Kate Bosworth is joining Drew to chat about turning 40, traveling to Hawaii with fiance Justin Long and the 20th anniversary of "Blue Crush.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are covering today's hottest headlines like the reactions to the "Barbie" trailer and the popular new meetup event called "the not working experience.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Jennette McCurdy, author of the best-selling memoir, "I'm Glad My Mom Died," has a very honest and revealing conversation with Drew.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew sits down with tennis superstar Serena Williams to chat about her final match, her family life and her new children's book, 'The Adventures of Qai Qai.' Plus, Serena plays a rapid fire round of all of her favorites in GOATS To Go.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Worst Cooks in America" host Anne Burrell is joining Drew in the kitchen to whip up a delicious seared red snapper with Sicilian cauliflower.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Bros" star and co-producer Guy Branum joins Drew and Ross at the new's desk. Plus, "Bros" stars Billy Eichner and Luke Macfarlane stop by to chat and play a rousing game of Never Have I Ever with a twist.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Paris in Love" star Paris Hilton joins Drew to chat. Then, CBS News Anchor Michelle Miller is helping Drew and Ross hit the headlines at the Drew's News desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Weird: The Al Yankovic Story" star Daniel Radcliffe stops by to chat.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew is joined by rapper, actor, and entrepreneur Fat Joe at the news desk. Then, in all new Drew Crime, Drew meets mixed martial artist Ro Malabanan.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Abbott Elementary" star Lisa Ann Walter is joining Drew as a co-pilot all show long and talking all about "Abbott Elementary" and working with Lindsay Lohan on "The Parent Trap!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew is joined by her friend "Shazam! Fury of the Gods" star Lucy Liu and she's dishing on some of her iconic roles like "Charlie's Angels" and "Kill Bill.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Iconic duo and longtime best friends Jane Fonda and Lily Tomlin are chatting with Drew all about meeting her as a kid, their new film, "Moving On," their secrets to a lasting friendship and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: TikTok star Julian Thomas AKA Marfa Stewart is sharing his favorite cleaning hacks including drill brush attachments, coffee filters, metal lint removers and more.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Dr. Martin of the zoo keeps giving Ellie more critters than Granny can stand. While Jim Gardner (or Jim Garrrrr!) comes to sell "bug vittles" but ends up falling for Ellie.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed and Mr. Drysdale try matching Ellie with the bank's new CPA Fred Penrod (or Rod Fredpen) while Lafe continues to try to find where "Jed has his money buried".

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Lafe Crick tries some match making with his son Dub and Ellie. Jed has his reservations.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale tries to get the Clampetts interested in deep-sea fishing by sending them to Marineland. Thinking that it's a fishing hole, Granny wants to "catch the whale".

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: It's tonic time in Beverly Hills. Granny's made a batch of tonic and sends a sample to their new neighbor, the Countess Maria. She loves it and throws a party to celebrate.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale is having a ground-breaking ceremony for a new bank building and the Clampetts think they need to pitch in to help build it. Meanwhile, Mr. Drysdale's associates try to get stock market tips off of Jed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts get a big food package from home and Mr. Drysdale's two associates, Mr. Lucus and Mr. Pendleton think that the crawdads have something to do with the development of military reconnaissance technology.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale has Jed buy a Beverly Hills dress store for an investment and the Clampetts show up to help "the poor widow and her starving girls".

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts try to turn their newly acquired Beverly Hills dress boutique, The House of Renee, into a country store, The House of Granny.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed sends Elly to the Beverly Hills dress boutique he used to own (now the House of Maurice) to learn how to be a lady, where Mrs. Drysdale mistakes her for royalty.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale wants Jed to incorporate for the tax advantages. So the Clampetts take over the top floor of the Commerce Bank and start doing what they can to stimulate the economy by getting more money into the hands of more people.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny's driving and Ellie's cooking makes a policeman and a cab driver think that the Clampett Mansion is a mental institution.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale gets Jed's old cabin from back home and sets it up in the Clampett's backyard to surprise Granny on her birthday. A coed with a sociology major thinks that they live there as the Drysdale's servants.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale hires a demolition man to remove the Clampett's cabin. Mr. Drysdale decides to occupy the cabin so it can't be removed. The Clampetts think a "homewrecker" is breaking up the Drysdale's marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro's running late for his graduation ceremony despite his new watch. Mrs. Potts of Jethro's school is afraid that his attendance will jeopardize her chances for a new endowment. Cousin Bessie saves the day.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale buys Mammoth Pictures, a movie studio. Jed, Granny, Elly and Jethro try to "help" the studio, which is losing money, by working at the studio.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale tells the Clampetts that he is building a city on the location where Jed's movie studio is located. The Clampetts mistake a western prop town for the city.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts decide to run the store on the empty studio Western set but can't understand why they don't have any customers.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed gets an honorary doctorate when he donates money to the college that Mr. Drysdale attended. Now the family thinks he can now practice medicine, which doesn't sit well with Granny.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale thinks she can get the hillbillies to move out by throwing herself at Jed. Meanwhile Granny is itching to fight her because she fell into the cement pond when Jed had to stop a fight between them earlier.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: An old friend from back in the hills is now an Elvis like singing idol. The Clampetts misunderstand the situation and decide to help Johnny get on his feet.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Johnny Poke's mother arrives from the Ozarks and Granny's matchmaking begins. Jed and Emma Poke come up with a plan to discourage her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale needs Jed to donate $190,000 to save the Beverly Hills Ballet but he has his hands full trying to keep Granny from heading back to the hills pushing all her stuff in a wheelbarrow.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale talks the butler into staying on, posing as a boarder, so that he can teach the Clampetts how to be more civilized.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts still don't realize that Mr. Pinckney is their butler instead of their boarder. When he tries to leave them Granny thinks he trying to skip without paying his rent.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Hospitalized for nerves from dealing with the hillbillies Mrs. Drysdale threatens Mr. Drysdale to stay there until he gets rid of them and even sending for a specialist. Unfortunately, the Clampet clan is on their way to visit her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale wakes up to find she is no longer in the hospital. The Clampetts, unhappy with what they feel as the hospital's poor level of care, break her out and set her up in their mansion.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S02E004) After an illegal late-night poker game, Brandon and Dylan clash over a break-in at the beach club.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S02E005) Kelly is mortified when her mother starts dating David's father and plots to break up the new couple.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S02E007) The gang heads up to Yosemite on what turns out to be a totally doomed camping trip.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S02E009) An effort to create a neighborhood security patrol goes horribly awry resulting in race hate and violence.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S02E010) When Dylan's long-absent mother moves back into his life - not to mention into his home - things come to a head, forcing Dylan to confront his issues not only with his mother, but with himself as well.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S02E011) Brandon and Brenda's paraplegic cousin Bobby is visiting Beverly Hills - and Kelly finds him extremely interesting!

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S02E012) Andrea wins a high-school journalism contest, but her victory is marred by a school district investigation.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S02E013) The gang goes to a Halloween party, but things take a turn for the worst when Kelly's seductive costume catches the eye of a college student whose intentions are less than honorable.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210
programme.desc: (S02E015) Emily invites everyone to a secret party at an underground club - where she does something that could end her relationship with Brandon forever.

programme.desc: Ceaser is forced to confront his employees after learning that Kitty was jumped. A rumor sends Young Bae into attack mode while Nikki finally agrees to let Richard work at 113th. Sky concocts a crazy plan to get Donna back at the shop.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Dutchess takes over 113th and plans a 24-hour tattoo-a-thon to save the shop, but a fight between Sky and Tiffany threatens to ruin the entire event. An urgent call from Richard has Nikki racing to the Bronx courthouse.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Sky ends up with stitches when Tiffany confronts her about her attitude. Melody wants to return to Black Ink. Sky shares a closely guarded secret with Ceaser. Richard and Nikki's wedding celebration turns ugly.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Walt tries to convince Richard to take care of his legal situation. Ceaser is shocked when Donna shows up at the shop wanting her job back. Dutchess comes home to NYC to celebrate her magazine cover.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser is shocked when Dutchess leaves him. Sky asks her female co-workers for a very personal favor. Walt and Sky introduce Young Bae to online dating. Sky fears for her safety when a man from her past shows up at the shop.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: The crew takes Ceaser to Miami for some sun, sand, and senoritas. Richard battles it out in court with Kathie over custody of their son. Dutchess receives a disturbing phone call that has her questioning her decision to leave NYC

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: The crew heads out on a camping trip for some team-building exercises but all hell breaks loose when an unexpected visitor arrives. Dutchess demands proof of Ceaser's affair. Sky and Donna discover dark secrets from Nikki's past

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: The crew tries to persuade Ceaser to reopen the shop. Dutchess returns to New York and makes a shocking discovery on Ceaser's computer. A Friendsgiving celebration turns sour when Sky attacks Teddy about his behavior.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: As the crew heads to Puerto Rico, a massive screw-up from Teddy threatens to derail the entire trip. Melody loses her cool when Lalo refuses to make the ultimate commitment. Ceaser and Dutchess finally come face to face.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: The crew parties on a boat off the coast of Puerto Rico but things get rocky when Ceaser exposes the truth about Nikki's past. Melody and Lalo commit their lives to each other. Dutchess makes an emotional plea to win Ceaser back.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: The crew celebrates the grand re-opening of Black Ink. Ted is on the defense as Melody makes a power play to become manager. O'S**t reveals shocking information about Nikki. Melody catches Ceaser in a compromising position.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser and the crew turn it up at DMX's birthday party. Sky is determined to stop Kitty from becoming Ceaser's new woman. Someone from Nikki's past shows up with shocking news. And a fancy dinner ends when Sky trashes the table.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: An angry Miss Kitty confronts Ceaser about sleeping with Allison. Richard rushes to the hospital after an urgent text message from Nikki. Dutchess gets her groove back with an NFL player after hearing about Ceaser's sex life.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Sky returns to 113th and shares some big news. Ceaser attempts damage control with Miss Kitty. Sky heads to the boardroom to pitch her new workout. All hell breaks loose when Donna says Sky doesn't deserve her promotion.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentran cuerpos en lugares públicos alrededor de Boston, el UAC investiga si un taxi o servicio de transporte que las víctimas utilizaron antes de su muerte podría guiar hasta el sospechoso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC busca un móvil y un sospechoso cuando las víctimas se encuentran en los inodoros de las paradas de camiones a lo largo de las carreteras en todo el sur.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras que el equipo de NCIS investiga el asesinato de un oficial del Mossad en Virginia, Tony y Ziva viajan a Berlín para rastrear al asesino de su padre.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Ignorando las órdenes de Seguridad Nacional, el equipo busca a Bodnar para vengar las muertes de Eli David y Jackie Vance.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Un investigador del Departamento de Defensa analiza la responsabilidad del equipo en el caso Bodnar; el equipo debe determinar si un contramaestre está sufriendo de paranoia o no al declarar que estaba siendo perseguido.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: La búsqueda internacional del asesino de Eli David y Jackie Vance da un giro cuando comienza una cacería de brujas federal contra Gibbs y su equipo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Genética
programme.desc: Cuando Eddie y Jamie se involucran demasiado en un complicado caso de adopción entre los padres biológicos y los padres adoptivos, piden a Erin que los ayude a resolver el conflicto sin ir a la corte.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Aún persiste
programme.desc: Cuando Danny acepta un trabajo extra como guardaespaldas para un ex convicto recién liberado que asumió la culpa por otra persona, aprovecha la oportunidad para ir tras el verdadero criminal.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Quien se aleja
programme.desc: Cuando la inmunidad diplomática complica un caso de abuso infantil para Danny y Baez, Frank interviene, a pesar de no tener jurisdicción en el caso.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Dentro y fuera
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el asesinato de un líder de pandilla, Danny y Baez descubren que el presunto asesino es un ex convicto que tiene una relación romántica con su oficial de libertad condicional, quien podría estar ayudando a encubrir el crimen.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC busca un móvil y un sospechoso cuando las víctimas se encuentran en los inodoros de las paradas de camiones a lo largo de las carreteras en todo el sur.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una chica de 18 años escapa de una casa suburbana donde estuvo cautiva por años con otras dos mujeres, el UAC busca al sospechoso que las secuestró.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC lleva a cabo una búsqueda en Los Ángeles después de que el equipo descubre imágenes de seguridad que muestran a un sospechoso siendo invitado a las casas de las víctimas.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando Morgan es secuestrado, la UAC se apresura a buscarlo y salvarle la vida.

programme.desc: Eight male athletes tussle in Drag Race, Pile Up and Splinter. But only one man gets to take on the Skullbuster for a shot at $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Eight formidable female athletes compete in Drag Race, Pile Up and Splinter. One will earn the right to take on the Skullbuster for an opportunity to win $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Eight of the biggest athletes to ever step foot on the ranch battle it out in Possession, Bail Out and The Crate. But only one will survive to take on the Skullbuster for a shot at $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Eight female athletes are put to the test in Possession, Bail Out and The Crate. But only one will take on the Skullbuster for a chance to win $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Eight male athletes face off in The Summit, Barn Burner and Strapped. The winner moves on to the Skullbuster and a chance to win $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Steve invites eight first responders to battle it out in Trench Warfare, High & Dry and Hard Labor. Only one will come out on top and take on the Skullbuster for a chance to win $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Steve Austin hosts this bunch of 12 rough and rowdy good old boys and girls on an uninhabited paradise, as they battle each other for $100,000 in cold hard cash.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: A new redneck in peak physical condition arrives on the island challenging established relationships. The contestants are already tired of canned food, the contestants decide to hunt for an alternate protein source: LIZARD!

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: As the castaway rednecks hunt for jungle veggies, they learn that you shouldn¹t search for food in the area that used to be the latrine.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: With one team dominating, Steve makes a surprise announcement that makes tensions run high on the island; the rednecks are excited about the arrival of some new critters in the camp and must decide where they fall on the food chain.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/21/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits Koreatown in Los Angeles, where he finds a tight-knit community marked by the 1992 Rodney King riots.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/28/2013. Colombia has changed immensely over the past 10 years. Anthony Bourdain explores several regions of the country, from the mountains down to the Caribbean coast.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/05/2013. Chefs and restauranteurs Fred Morin and Dave McMillan, of Joe Beef’s, take us across Canada by rail.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/12/2013. Anthony Bourdain explores the "Interzone,” where artists like Burroughs, Bowles and the Rolling Stones sought escape from Western moral prohibitions.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/19/2013. Anthony Bourdain explores Libyan hip-hop, Italian restaurants and post-war uncertainty, by examining the country through personal stories, food and music.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 06/02/2013. Bourdain and his friend, world-renowned chef Eric Ripert, move from hip, modern Lima back in time into pre-Columbian Peru.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 06/09/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits Congo, the setting of one of his favorite books, Conrad’s “Heart of Darkness.”

programme.title: Declassified
programme.desc: Aired 6/19/2016. At the height of the Cold War, the CIA recruited a Soviet diplomat with the code name TRIGON to gain valuable intelligence from inside the Soviet Union.

programme.title: Declassified
programme.desc: Aired 6/26/2016. A Defense Intelligence Agency interrogator and U.S Special Forces work together to find missing Iraqi dictator Saddam Hussein.

programme.title: Declassified
programme.desc: Aired 7/03/2016. The Joint Special Operations Command needed to stop violent AQI leader Abu Musab al-Zarqawi and put an end to his reign of terror.

programme.title: Declassified
programme.desc: Aired 7/10/2016. The FBI and Defense Intelligence Agency join forces to catch Ana Montes, a senior DIA analyst who was passing sensitive intelligence to Cuba.

programme.title: Declassified
programme.desc: Aired 8/14/2016. Homeland Security Investigations conducts an elaborate undercover sting operation to stop an illegal arms dealer.

programme.title: Declassified
programme.desc: Aired 8/21/2016. After the Taliban refused to release international aid workers being held hostage in Afghanistan, the CIA, Joint Special Operations Command, and a Taliban double agent race against time to rescue them.

programme.title: Declassified
programme.desc: Aired 8/28/2016. In 2004, the FBI and Naval Criminal Investigative Service needed to catch an engineer who had been stealing U.S. Navy secrets for the Chinese government.

programme.title: Declassified
programme.desc: Aired 9/04/2016. When classified footage from a top secret surveillance satellite was lost in the Pacific Ocean during the Cold War, the U.S. military engaged in a race against time to find and recover the footage before it fell into enemy hands.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 06/09/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits Congo, the setting of one of his favorite books, Conrad’s “Heart of Darkness.”

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy tries to cut a guy some slack after his relationship troubles got out of hand. A teenager gets a serious lesson in not drinking while underage. A couple is forced to take a raincheck on their wedding day.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleet-footed deputy nabs a suspect on the run, officers responding to a domestic call are refused entry, and police try to ascertain the cause of a woman's hallucinations.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect has a change of heart after he leads police on a pursuit. An Officer discovers sterile syringes and rocks in a suspicious man's pocket after he is stopped and searched. A woman is arrested for stealing C.D's out of a car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a stolen motorcycle that turns into a foot chase. A domestic violence call results in the arrest of an abusive stepdad. Officers respond after a fight over cigarettes escalate.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police deploy spike strips to curb a stolen vehicle, a parolee at large speeds away with a two-month-old in the car, and officers try to determine the details of a stabbing.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A patrolman pursues a scooter speeding through a neighborhood, officers try to subdue a raving man, and a woman has issues with her neighbor's dogs.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The occupants of a car try to conceal their identities. Officers investigate a vehicle lingering near a park known for illicit sexual activity. Officer investigates a robbery claim at a truck stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man tries to escape on foot after driving without a license, two friends hide meth in plain sight, and an intoxicated man is caught peering into a restaurant after hours.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers capture a suspected burglar, a felon, and his girlfriend are taken into custody after a standoff with police, and a man is arrested for possession of a stolen moped.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A vehicle tries to force an off-duty deputy off of the road. An officer responds to a domestic disturbance call involving a woman and her husband's potential lover. A hostile man is out-of-control at a local residence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers arrest a man suspected of robbery. A riot erupts at a juvenile party on the beach. Officers find an intoxicated man stuck on an iron fence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A family gets a huge scare when a fleeing suspect finds his way into their house. Police sort out a chaotic argument between two childhood friends. A woman in a suspicious vehicle plays fast and loose with the truth.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers arrest a couple during an argument over who the narcotics belong to. Police seize a large bag of marijuana after a routine stop. A man is caught harboring drugs under his tongue during questioning.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer on street patrol chases down a suspect on foot, an alleged car thief posts his exploits on Facebook, and a crashed stolen car may not have been stolen after all.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer poses as a prostitute in an attempt to attract interested “johns”. A suspect flees on foot through the woods following an assault. An officer decides to check out a local bar where a lot of illegal activity takes place.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A disgruntled man is tased, leaving his unhoused wife to fend for herself. A sovereign citizen is arrested for a stolen firearm. A man in possession of meth claims a bag belongs to his girlfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A daring driver takes officers on a wild ride, a man offers a bizarre excuse for the items found in his car, and a man is arrested after threatening his neighbor with a gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A teenager who ran away from home tries running from the cops too. A man set a date to turn his life around, but deputies ask him to start earlier. A man found with hundreds of sunglasses claims he was going to give them away.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police go off-roading to follow a stolen car, a man has odd excuses for having suspicious items, and an officer settles a dispute between a wife and her jealous husband.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An innocent conversation turns into a high-speed motorcycle chase, a driver gets ratted out by his passengers, and a series of bad decisions land a young man in hot water.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man leads officers on a frantic foot-chase, deputies assist two teens in tracking down a man who stole their bike, and a dispute between roommates takes a dark turn.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An Officer goes undercover as a prostitute. A woman finds a snake in her home. A man solicits himself to an undercover officer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers stop a suspicious pedestrian, police and their K-9 dog search for weapons in a suspect's vehicle, and a wanted woman is stopped on a moped with her pet dog.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist runs a red light then runs from police, deputies arrest an uncooperative domestic violence suspect, and a low-speed chase ends in a drug arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect on the run makes a dangerous decision when he finds himself cornered. An unsuspecting driver gets more than she bargained for when she gives an old friend a lift. A friendly woman has a thing for cowboys.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stolen truck drives against traffic during a pursuit. A DV suspect overdoses after fighting Deputies. An intoxicated father assaults his openly-gay son and hides behind a tree.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: After crashing a car during a pursuit, the driver runs into a pho restaurant and is captured. A loitering suspect is spotted smoking a meth pipe. A drunk driver is pulled from a smoking wreck.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Jane Galloway is a nervous breakdown waiting to happen. She has completely shielded herself from the outside world, but that doesn't stop a stalker in her attic from killing her.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate the stabbing death of an 80-year-old woman who lived in a run-down house full of cats.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Sara investigate when a man's body, which has been doused with lye, is found buried in a park.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his crew handle their highest profile case to date when the city's former chief of detectives is slain execution-style in his house following a wild party.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate when the body of an unidentified young woman is discovered stuffed in an overturned shopping cart near a freeway underpass.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine and Nick investigate street racing after one of the drivers is found dead out in the desert at an abandoned airstrip.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate a crime involving a popular actor.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate the murder of a wealthy couple who are found outside their home, which was up for sale.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom suspects murder when the body of a dwarf is found hanging from a rope high above a stage in a casino hotel where a convention of little people is being held.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Warrick, and Sara investigate when a woman vanishes while taking part in a magician's act.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Fifteen years ago, Catherine helped put a man on death row for the rape and murder of a coed at a nearby college. The man is about to be executed when he's granted a stay based on new DNA evidence.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A boxing champ dies in the ring after taking a brutal beating from his nemesis, but Grissom finds evidence that points to murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine is called in by a pornographic-film developer to view graphic footage from a snuff movie in which a woman is brutally slain.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A cab driver seems to run over a boy and is then beaten to death by a mob for racial reasons.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se adentra entre bastidores en un estudio de cine porno de terror para investigar el asesinato de una actriz de cine slasher asesinada en el plató de una de sus películas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: En la primera parte de un episodio crossover de dos partes que concluirá en Without A Trace, una víctima de secuestro de Nueva York que desapareció hace seis años puede ser el mismo chico cuya muerte Grissom y el equipo de CSI están investigando.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un sospechoso del pasado de Sara regresa, haciendo que se cuestione su futuro como CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La adicción de Warrick a las pastillas empieza a afectar a su trabajo cuando su investigación sobre la mafia clandestina de Las Vegas le convierte en el principal sospechoso de un asesinato relacionado con la mafia.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Hodges tiene segundas intenciones cuando escenifica hipotéticos asesinatos en el laboratorio para dar a sus colegas la oportunidad de jugar a ser CSI.

programme.title: CSI

programme.desc: Jealousy rears its ugly head when Frasier bumps into Lilith and her new boyfriend while vacationing with his new girlfriend.

programme.title: Rosario

programme.title: ¿A quién ama Gilbert Grape?

programme.title: A contrarreloj
programme.desc: En este fascinante thriller, el jefe de Policía (Denzel Washington) de una pequeña ciudad, se ve inmerso en graves problemas al investigar el asesinato de una mujer con la que mantenía una relación en secreto porque todas las pruebas apuntan a él.

programme.title: Venus
programme.desc: La vida de un par de actores veteranos cambia completamente cuando conocen a una radiante chica adolescente.

programme.title: ¿A quién ama Gilbert Grape?

programme.desc: Cuando Kate cumple 30 años, sus amigas Evie y Charlie se ofrecen a hacer una fiesta, pero la fiesta se sale de control.

programme.title: La boda de Valentina
programme.desc: Valentina tiene la vida perfecta en Estados Unidos. Su universo tiembla cuando su novio Jason le propone matrimonio y debe enfrentar a su familia, “los perfectos Tate”, con la suya, “los Hidalgo”, la dinastía política más caótica de la historia de México.

programme.title: En nombre del amor
programme.desc: De Nicholas Sparks, el autor best-seller, llega esta conmovedora historia sobre hasta dónde estamos dispuestos a llegar para mantener viva la esperanza del amor.

programme.desc: Conflictos de seducción, pasión y poder se revelan cuando los creadores de 'Instinto Básico' destapan el aparentemente glamoroso mundo del espectáculo en Las Vegas con esta controvertida película protagonizada por Elizabeth Berkley.

programme.title: Un Papá para Navidad
programme.desc: Rebeca, una estrella de las redes sociales enfocada en la fama, recibe una sorpresa cuando un desconocido, que dice ser su padre, aparece en Navidad.

programme.title: Frankie y Johnny

programme.title: The Curious Case Of Benjamin Button
programme.desc: Brad Pitt y Cate Blanchett protagonizan esta adaptación de la historia de F. Scott Fitzgerald acerca de un anciano que va rejuveneciendo y los problemas que surgen cuando se enamora de una mujer.

programme.title: Instinto predador

programme.title: USS Indianapolis: Hombres de coraje

programme.title: Instinto predador
programme.desc: Un cazador (Nicolas Cage) debe luchar por su vida en un barco cuando sus mortíferos animales -entre ellos un raro jaguar blanco- son soltados por un peligroso criminal que quiere matar a todos a bordo.

programme.title: Códigos de guerra

programme.title: Piratas de la isla del tesoro

programme.title: Terminator: El exterminador
programme.desc: En 2029, las super-computadoras dominan el planeta y buscan exterminar la raza humana. Para ello, mandan de regreso en el tiempo a un indestructible cyborg con la misión de matar a Sarah Connor, cuyo hijo se convertirá en la esperanza de la humanidad.

programme.title: No eres tú, soy yo

programme.title: El infierno

programme.title: Una mujer sin filtro

programme.title: Una última y nos vamos

programme.title: El Inca (LAS)

programme.title: Todos queremos a alguien

programme.title: Encubrimiento

programme.title: Hansel y Gretel: Cazadores de brujas

programme.title: Hellraiser III: El infierno en la tierra

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Klink reluctantly falls in with two other Kommandants plotting against Burkhalter. Burkhalter finds out. Now Hogan must step in before Stalag 13 loses Klink the military way - by firing squad.

programme.desc: Hogan's operation is known to a Gestapo man who wants to trade his knowledge for $1,000,000 in diamonds, but can he be trusted?

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.desc: All goes well when Hogan's gang steals Klink's code book from his safe, photographs the contents, and returns it to its proper place. But there's a small hitch - Carter forgets to load the camera with film.

programme.desc: Alex starts driving all the other cabbies crazy when he discovers his beloved family pet only has a short time to live.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: To what lengths will boyfriend Arnie go to win over Elaine's kids? Elaine is in for a surprise when she invites him over to meet her children.

programme.title: All in the Family

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Edith has news that Archie finally called home to let everyone know where he was. Supposedly he got sidetracked to a podiatrists' convention in Rochester.

programme.title: All in the Family

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: McGarrett watches with stunned realization as the state's rock-solid murder case against Islands racketeer Kum Chi suddenly vaporizes because McGarrett has been suckered by the prosecution's star witness.

programme.desc: Parker’s stepfather, Roy Eversole, is not a perfect man; he drinks too much, fights too much, and now he’s suspected of murdering his ex-boss, Norbert Clemmons, after losing his job. Parker can’t believe it, and neither can Gillespie. So who did it?

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: A nasty slumlord threatening to evict a single mother and her daughter is later suspected of murder, but Gillespie’s hands are tied as this is Sheriff McComb’s case. Meanwhile, Parker has a new speed gun and he’s become the most hated man in Sparta.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: The shooting of the campaign manager of a white supremacist politician appears to be a botched assassination attempt on the Senate candidate himself, but it soon reveals a web of deceit and betrayal. Was the assassination botched intentionally?

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: The shooting of Chris Pastore becomes a murder when, no longer able to hold on, he dies. Meanwhile, the question remains, was he the intended target? Gillespie and Tibbs continue their investigation into politician George Deschamps and his cronies.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: When an embezzler, Jimmy Ray, returns to Sparta after many years away, it stirs up old resentments as he encounters the families that he stole from years ago, including Virgil Tibbs’ sweet-natured Aunt Etta, who turns to Chief Gillespie for help.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: A rich landowner, Horace Sloan, is visited by Candace Sloan, a distant cousin who claims her grandfather was cheated out of a portion of the Sloan family estate. Horace’s readiness to give Candace her legacy, puts him at odds with his son, Lamar.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix's routine child custody case becomes complicated when it turns out the child's father is the target of killers.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A burglar steals notebooks from a psychiatrist, then double crosses his accomplice and takes the notebooks for himself. One of the patients hire Intertect after being blackmailed.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A newspaper is preparing an expose but the man holding the documentation for it flees as the story went to press. The newspaper hires Intertect and Mannix to investigate the case.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Intertect is retained by the police department to help transport an informant to safety. However, the case soon turns out to be more complicated - and very deadly.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: When a young woman fears her father is being swindled in an alcohol-rehabilitation centre in Mexico, Mannix goes undercover as an alcoholic who has been admitted there.

programme.title: Mannix

programme.desc: A killer and rapist is terrorizing the city, but Stone and Keller have almost no clues to lead them to the assailant.

programme.desc: Caine (DAVID CARRADINE) escapes from a mantrap and is caught in a far more dangerous snare, this one set by a beautiful woman. Mako guest stars.

programme.desc: Sent to investigate a strange situation on a possibly habitable planet, Dr. Evan Marshall (Larry Pennell) discovers the scientific team sent there is now dominated by a human mutant (Warren Oates) who can exist without sleep and kill by touch!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma is finally getting some control over her life. Snake and Spike are back together, she’s been running every day, and she’s barely eating.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Facing the pressure of year-end exams, the furthest thing from Marco’s mind is what happened a year ago – when Dylan stomped all over his heart. Marco takes this as a sign that he’s over Dylan for good.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The end of another school year finds Darcy’s faith – in her boyfriend – being put to the test. When she discovers that Spinner has a past, Darcy grapples with a harsh reality of teen romance: jealousy.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Peter receives a new car for his birthday, he quickly becomes a frequent face in the street racing scene.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things heat up between Emma and Sean – and when she takes time off from Peter to consider her relationship with Sean, Peter takes action – and Sean winds up expelled from Degrassi.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma is happy that the racing debacle is behind them, and that Peter is finally free if you don’t count the house arrest and five hundred hours of community service.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jimmy starts the year off with big plans, coaching the girl’s junior basketball team and he is determined to take his relationship with Ashley to the next level. But can Jimmy handle the realities of his sexual future?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Peter, hoping to join the Spirit Squad, links Darcy’s personal web page to his. Darcy is thrilled with all the attention and hits she gets, and even posts some racy pictures of the Spirit Squad.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Darcy’s online admirers take up more and more of her time, and her relationship with Spinner suffers. As Darcy posts increasingly sexy photos of herself, she’s surprised when her favourite online fan decides to introduce himself.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Career Aptitude test results come in, Spinner is less than pleased with his results, and in desperation, convinces Jimmy to go into business selling T-shirts adorned with Jimmy’s illustrations.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After being released from jail, Sean finds himself sleeping on Spike & Snake’s couch. Sean is focusing on putting the last few months behind him, getting a great job and being a fantastic boyfriend to Emma.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig’s back in town for a music festival – and Manny can’t help picking up right where they left off.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s parents want her to come home after the tragedy at Emma’s house – and to Emma’s surprise, Manny agrees.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.desc: Paige has one goal: to return to her former pre-Banting glory. She’s going to get back to doing what she does best. Everything – and that includes dating. Paige surprises Spinner by asking him out. Nothing serious, just casual.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: In 2000, scientists made a groundbreaking discovery, explaining how birds evolved from dinosaurs. However, a deeper investigation put a question mark over everything.

programme.title: Living with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: David Attenborough learns that descendants of the dinosaur age are alive and well. David explores how they survived the catastrophes that wiped out other species.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Until recently most scientists thought they knew what killed off the dinosaurs. It was a 10 km-wide meteorite which smashed into Yucatan in Mexico.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring Mongolia's Gobi Desert to determine whether dinosaurs exist in the present as birds. It is one of the harshest places on Earth with the biggest dinosaur graveyard.

programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Dinosaur
programme.desc: David Attenborough tells the story of the discovery and reconstruction in Argentina of the world's largest known dinosaur, a brand new species of titanosaur. Measuring 37m long, it now holds the record as the biggest animal ever to walk the earth.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Special effects-filled documentary beginning 49 million years ago. The world is heavily forested and birds rule the planet, preying on small mammals. Whales have not yet evolved and their ancestors walk on the land.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: A pregnant basilosaurus, an 18-metre, carnivorous whale which lives in the Tethys Sea, is forced to kill the young of a smaller whale to ensure the survival of her unborn calf.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Going back 25 million years to the time of the indricothere, which was the largest mammal ever to live on dry land, being seven metres high and weighing 15 tons! The only threat to an adult would have been the hyaenadon which was the size of a rhino.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: The beginnings of mankind can be traced back 3.2 million years to Ethiopia and the advent of Australopithecus, a type of ape which, like humans, was bipedal. These early members of the human family faced many dangers, including the sabre-toothed cat.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: This episode explains how the 120-million-year reign of the dinosaurs ended when mammals became the fastest and fiercest creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.desc: Christopher is barely 21, who already has a history of domestic abuse and assault, and now he's facing major time in a room without a view. This hunt won't be easy for Dog -- the leads are few, informers and family are not forthcoming.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Facing hard time for forging checks, Melissa pulled a vanishing act at her sentencing hearing, bolting from the courthouse in broad daylight. Lucky for her, bondsman Dog and his posse are in Colorado and ready to help.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is busy. First, he's after a fugitive who is allegedly an expert in the game of "burn and return"--shoplifting goods to return them for cash refunds.? But he's not easy to track.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Going after two fugitives in one day is tough enough without the facing Colorado's notoriously unpredictable weather. Today it's the threat of severe thunderstorm, hail and area wide tornado warnings.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It hurts Dog to see people who?after years of walking the straight and narrow, suddenly lose their way. But today's case is a member of the law enforcement community who has recently gone astray, and that truly troubles the Dog.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back in Denver and in hot pursuit of a woman wanted for identity theft. The sad reality is that the identity which has been robbed is her own. She's traded in a bright future for a life on the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Being hunted by the Dog is a lousy way to celebrate your birthday, but that's exactly the spot that Robert finds himself in today. He's missed his court date, quit his job, and vacated his last known address.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Both brother Tim and fellow Honolulu bondsman James need Dog's help to track down their hard to find fugitives. The two cases on the docket today are challenging, especially the hunt for Gregory, a felon with a lengthy rap sheet. A quick check of his

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's Beth's birthday and Dog knows just what she needs. He surprises Beth with Delilah, a puppy small enough to sit in the palm of her hand. Beth is so happy that she insists on taking the puppy with her on today's bounty.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's Halloween, and before Dog and Beth can help the kids carve their pumpkins, they have some business to attend to. It involves knocking on doors and meeting the neighbors, but instead of hunting for treats, they're on the search for a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team have girl trouble in this case. Krystal jumped bail and seems to have vanished into the high plains of Colorado. To make matters worse, she's running with her lover (and bond co-signer) Carrie. But Thelma and Louise they ain't.

programme.title: Breeder of the Pack

programme.title: Pick A Puppy

programme.title: Dogs with Jobs

programme.desc: Adventurer Ben Fogle is on one of his favourite dog walks, along the tranquil banks of the River Thames, with his black lab Storm.

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers
programme.desc: Inspector Herchy Boal teams up with the police to attend a property near Birmingham suspected of puppy farming. Tragically, for one puppy it was already too late, but she manages to rescue another 37 including 8 expectant mothers.

programme.desc: Max the Amazing performs his "now you see me, now you don't" jumping trick; bride falls off chair after kiss; squirrel in the window.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle and Alexis, trapped in a burning cabin far off in the woods, find the door has been locked--from the outside. Mark, who has come to see Krystle in this remote setting, dramatically rescues the two women, who are rushed to the hospital.

programme.desc: Mark is charged with attempted murder and arson; Alexis tells Blake and the police his motive was revenge. The other suspects-McVane, Hess and Adam, are questioned and released.

programme.title: The Herd with Colin Cowherd
programme.desc: THE HERD WITH COLIN COWHERD is a three-hour sports television show hosted by Colin Cowherd and Jason McIntyre. Cowherd is a veteran broadcaster with over 20 years of experience in the sports television and radio field.

programme.title: First Things First
programme.desc: FIRST THINGS FIRST is a daily sports talk show hosted by Nick Wright, Chris Broussard and Kevin Wildes. Wright started his broadcasting career as a critically acclaimed radio host and is joined by longtime sports reporter and commentator Chris Broussard.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: A crane will be driving alongside the edge of a berth with its boom arm extended out over the berth. Contestants will start this stunt by jumping into garbage, retrieving items. 2 contestants will hold onto ski lines connected to the helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants support one another while leaning out over each side of a boat. Each contestant will be lying in a vertical position and rotated head over feet. Each contestant will be in a car and on go will back off the flatbed trucks.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The parents my make their way across the ledge of the Universal Orlando while their child stands on their shoulders. The mother son team must retrieve keys. Contestants are seated in a car and must and lock it into position underneath a moving semi-truck.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Five contestants will be seated in derby cars while their partners balance on top of 30-foot poles. The contestants will maneuver a swamp boat using a gondolier's staff through a swamp obstacle course.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will both start on a SeaDoo as they speed towards a buoy, jump off at the buoy, grab a floating fire extinguisher, and swim to a platform behind a house boat that is on fire. One contestant will be placed in a Plexiglas box filled with bugs.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Both contestants are trapped in cars that are each suspended by cranes opposing each other. The female contestant will be locked to a conveyer belt that will be lowered into a shaft filled with hundreds of webs crawling with thousands of tarantulas.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: One contestant will launch herself from a pneumatic chair off into the water. Couple will be placed together in a Plexiglas box with separated. One contestant will drop from a helicopter and swim over to a buoy with a key on it.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be hanging by their ankles from a crane above the water. Couples must sit inside a barrel in a kneeling position. Contestants are driving on a swervy course while trying to run through a series of barrels and wooden structures.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be dropped into the water. Couples will be presented with a picnic baskets filled with a Fear Factor style meal. One contestant will be underneath the train at the back of a car, while her partner will be on the side of the same car.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants are harnessed and locked into a computer ratchet system. Couples will make their way through junkyard obstacles, retrieving hubcaps. The male contestants will be standing on top of a bus while their female partners are strapped under the bus.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants are strapped to a line on the deck, with their bungees attached to a helicopter. Contestants will cut their way through two separate ropes. Contestants are connected to a helicopter and must repel down.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA
programme.desc: Five teams of two compete for $100,000 dollars as they are flown underneath the belly of a helicopter, eat bees, are launched off a building through glass, deal with the horror of bull testicles and drive a car through the back of a moving semi truck.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA
programme.desc: Five teams of 2 are bungied off a cliff, must eat leeches, must run through a burning building, deal with the Wheel of Misfortune, and finally grab flags off a moving car while dangling of a crane. All is the hopes of winning $100,000.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA
programme.desc: Four couples compete for $50,000. In order to win they must face getting catapulted off the top of a tall building, transfer snakes with theirs mouths and transfers flags to a partner hanging under a helicopter, all while riding a personal watercraft.

programme.desc: Monica must find a way to help a successful journalist admit that her drinking threatens to separate her permanently from her family

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: A pregnant teen must decide what to do.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
